div.div:
score = (successful_calls / total_steps) × 0.7
− (error_steps / total_steps) × 0.3
+ 0.3 if final_answer present
Clamped [0.0, 1.0]
≥ 0.7 → 🟢 High (green badge)
≥ 0.4 → 🟡 Medium (amber badge)
< 0.4 → 🔴 Low (red badge)

div.div:
pool_size = 5 (persistent connections)
max_overflow = 10 (burst → max 15)
pool_recycle = 1800 s (30 min)
pool_pre_ping = True (validate before use)
